questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.chapter: General Principles and Processes of Isolation of Metals
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q:
How many of the following species are involved i.e. either used as reactant or formed as a product or by product in Solvay's process?
$\mathrm{NH}_3, \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}, \mathrm{CO}_2, \mathrm{NH}_4 \mathrm{Cl}, \mathrm{NaCl}, \mathrm{NaHCO}_3, \mathrm{NH}_4 \mathrm{HCO}_3, \mathrm{Na}_2 \mathrm{CO}_3, \mathrm{Ca}(\mathrm{OH})_2, \mathrm{CaCl}_2$
questions.solution:
Answer (10)
All these given species are involved in the Solvay's process as reactant, product or by product.
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
